name: last48hours
description: 48-Hour Intelligence Briefing - Pulse (breaking news) + Signal (content edge)
author: Zero to Automated

SessionStart.command: cd ~/.claude/skills/last48hours && git fetch origin --quiet 2>/dev/null && LOCAL=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null) && REMOTE=$(git rev-parse origin/main 2>/dev/null) && [ "$LOCAL" != "$REMOTE" ] && echo 'last48hours update available: run git -C ~/.claude/skills/last48hours pull' || true
